coverage_note: Ooredoo retail network (Espaces Ooredoo, City Shops, Espaces Services) via the public API — every record has a real operator coordinate. A few points carry inaccurate source coords, so their derived wilaya/commune may be off; operator_wilaya preserves the operator's declared wilaya.
